caption: A white background features light blue text in the upper half that reads, "For more information, please visit www.st.com". A thin blue horizontal line separates this text from the bottom half of the screen, with small grey text along the line stating, "All rights reserved © STMicroelectronics 2015". The lower half of the screen transitions from being empty to displaying a stylized blue "ST" logo. As the sequence progresses, the logo appears centrally on the left before shifting slightly to the right. In the final stage, the text "life.augmented" appears in a smaller, grey font directly beneath the "ST" logo. The overall scene is a clean, corporate graphic animation moving from a textual call to action toward a branded company logo and slogan.
